posts.author: BellmereWatcher
posts.text: Stop sharing that rumour about the new 'detox' app! I've seen it circulating around town claiming to cure all diseases. It's absolute nonsense and people are falling for it. Don't risk your health on fake science, just stick to what doctors recommend. #wellness
posts.explanation: The post correctly identifies and debunks a harmful rumour without spreading the false claim itself.
